title: Test to assist in diagnosis and screening of cancer
abstract: The present document describes screening composition bases comprising marker compounds, pigments and catalysts, which are combined with activator compositions, to provide screening composition for screening cancers.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. A screening composition base comprising: â¢ a marker compound, chosen from at least one of iodine, fluorescein and fluorescein 5(6)-isothiocyanate (FITC), calcein, and eosin Y; â¢ from about 0.035% w/v to about 0.055% w/v of calcium carbonate (CaC0 3 ); â¢ from about about 0.045% w/v to about 0.055% w/v potassium carbonate (KC0 3 ); â¢ from about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.035% of Boron trioxide (B 2 0 3 ); â¢ from about 30% w/v to about 35% w/v titanium dioxide (Ti0 2 ); at least one of from about 0.045% w/v to about 0.35% w/v sulfur, and from about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v of aluminum oxide (AI0 3 ); â¢ at least two of from about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.01 15% w/v of cesium bromide (CsBr); - from about 0.017% w/v to about 0.023% w/v of Scandium (III) oxide (Sc 2 0 3 ); from about 0.025% w/v to about 0.045% w/v of Magnesium oxide (MgO); and from about 0.0035% w/v to about 0.01 15% w/v of tin powder; and â¢ a quantity sufficient of a suitable solvent to make up 100% of the composition. 2. The screening composition base of claim 1 , wherein said marker compound is a mixture of iodine and fluorescein. 3. The screening composition base of any one of claims 1 to 2, further comprising a catalyst chosen from Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ), about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ), and a combination thereof. 4. The screening composition base of any one of claims 1 to 2, further comprising a pigment chosen from about 0.017% w/v to about 0.023% w/v Scandium (III) oxide (Sc 2 0 3 ), about 2.15% w/v to about 2.85% w/v Erbium (III) oxide (Er 2 0 3 ), about 0.0045% 

 w/v to about 0.065% w/v ferric oxide (Fe 2 0 3 ), about 0.00215% w/v to about 0.0285% w/v Chromium (III) oxide (Cr 2 0 3 ), about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0), about 0.0095% w/v to about 0.0255% w/v copper (II) oxide (CuO), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), Zinc oxide (ZnO), about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.115% w/v Tungsten (VI) oxide (W0 3 ), about 0.03% w/v to about 0.085% w/v Selenium Powder (Se), and a combination thereof. 5. The screening composition base of any one of claims 1 to 4, further comprising adsorbent chosen from a silica gel (Si0 2 ), Strontium titanate (SrTi0 3 ), or a cellulose and a combination thereof. 6. The screening composition base of any one of claims 1 to 5, further comprising an additional ingredient chosen from about 0.004% w/v to about 0.0285% w/v Niobium (V) oxide (Nb 2 0 5 ), from about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.0115% w/v of cesium bromide (CsBr) and a combination thereof. 7. The screening composition base of any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein said adsorbent is Strontium titanate (SrTi0 3 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a pre-stage 0 cancer.. 8. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.00215% w/v to about 0.0285% w/v Chromium (III) oxide (Cr 2 0 3 ), and said catalyst is Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a bladder cancer activity. 9. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0) and Zinc oxide (ZnO), and said catalyst is about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a bone cancer activity. 10. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0) and about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), and said catalyst is Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a brain cancer activity. 11. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), and said catalyst is about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a breast cancer tumour activity. 12. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0) and about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.115% w/v Tungsten (VI) oxide (W0 3 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a cervical cancer activity. 13. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0) and said catalyst is about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a colon cancer activity. 14. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.115% w/v Tungsten (VI) oxide (W0 3 ) and said catalyst is Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a gall bladder cancer activity. 15. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.03% w/v to about 0.085% w/v Selenium powder, and said catalyst is Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a kidney cancer activity. 16. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0) and about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), and said catalyst is Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a leukemia activity. 17. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0), and said catalyst is Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ), about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a liver cancer activity. 18. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0), and said catalyst is Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ), about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a lung cancer activity. 19. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ) and Zinc oxide (ZnO), and said catalyst is about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a lymphoma activity. 20. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.03% w/v to about 0.085% w/v Selenium powder (Se), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of an ovarian cancer activity. 21. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ) and about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.115% w/v Tungsten (VI) oxide (W0 3 ), and said catalyst is about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a pancreatic cancer activity. 22. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ) and Zinc oxide (ZnO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a prostate cancer activity. 23. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0), and said catalyst is about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a skin cancer activity. 24. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), and said catalyst is Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ) and Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ) for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a stomach cancer activity. 25. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said catalyst is Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ), about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), and Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a uterine cancer activity. 26. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.065% w/v ferric oxide (Fe 2 0 3 ), and said additional ingredient is about 0.004% w/v to about 0.0285% w/v Niobium (V) oxide (Nb 2 0 5 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of a calcium activity. 27. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.00215% w/v to about 0.0285% w/v Chromium (III) oxide (Cr 2 0 3 ), and 

 said catalyst is about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of estrogen activity. 28. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said catalyst is Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ), and said additional ingredient is from about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.0115% w/v of cesium bromide (CsBr) for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of potassium activity. 29. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said adsorbent is Strontium titanate (SrTi0 3 ), and said additional ingredient is from about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.0115% w/v of cesium bromide (CsBr) for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of iron activity. 30. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.065% w/v ferric oxide (Fe 2 0 3 ), and about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of sulfur activity. 31. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.03% w/v to about 0.085% w/v Selenium powder, and said additional ingredient is from about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.0115% w/v of cesium bromide (CsBr) for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of nickel activity. 32. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.065% w/v Ferric oxide (Fe 2 0 3 ) and about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of Stage 3 interleukin activity. 33. The screening composition base of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein said pigment is about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.065% w/v Ferric oxide (Fe 2 0 3 ) and about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), and said pigment is sulfur 

 powder for preparation of a screening composition for the screening of Stage 4 cancer interleukin activity. 34. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 1 , in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.115% w/v Tungsten (VI) oxide (W0 3 ), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 4 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), and about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening cancer yeast activity. 35. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 7, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.115% w/v Tungsten (VI) oxide (WO 3 ), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 4 ), Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ), Zirconium (IV) oxide (Zr0 2 ) and about 0.1 1 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening bladder cancer activity. 36. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 9, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.005% w/v to about 0.0065% w/v Bismuth bromide (BiBr 3 ), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 4 ), Aluminum bromide (AIBr 3 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), and about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening bone cancer activity. 37. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 10, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.005% w/v to about 0.0065% w/v Bismuth bromide (BiBr 3 ), Aluminum bromide (AIBr 3 ), about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.1 15% w/v Tungsten (VI) oxide (W0 3 ), about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), and about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening brain cancer activity. 38. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 11 , in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.004% w/v to about 0.0055% w/v Silver (I) oxide (Ag 2 0), Zirconium (VI) oxide, 0.0035% w/v to about 0.01 15% w/v of Tin powder (Sn), about 0.0065% w/v to about 0.00225% w/v Tantalum (V) oxide (Ta 2 0 5 ), and about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide for screening breast cancer tumour activity. 39. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 12, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising 0.0035% w/v to about 0.0115% w/v of Tin powder (Sn), about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.029% w/v Calcium fluoride (CaF 2 ) and about 0.1 1 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening cervical cancer activity. 40. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 13, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.005% w/v to about 0.0065% w/v Bismuth bromide (BiBr 3 ), about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.08% w/v Copper (I) oxide (Cu 2 0), 

 about 0.004% w/v to about 0.0055% w/v Silver (I) oxide (Ag 2 0) and about 0.0075% w/v to about 0.0105% w/v Molybdenum (VI) oxide (Mo0 3 ), for screening colon cancer activity. 41. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 14, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), about 0.0095% w/v to about 0.0255% w/v copper (II) oxide (CuO), Strontium titanate (SrTi0 3 ), Cadmium oxide (CdO), and about 0.1 1 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening gall bladder cancer activity. 42. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 15, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ), barium fluoride (BaF 2 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.029% w/v Calcium fluoride (CaF 2 ), and about 0.1 1 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening kidney cancer activity. 43. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 16, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), about 0.0095% w/v to about 0.0255% w/v copper (II) oxide (CuO), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), Manganese (II) oxide (MnO), and about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening leukemia activity. A screening composition comprising a screening composition base of claim 17, in combination with 

 â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 4 ), Barium fluoride (BaF 2 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.029% w/v Calcium fluoride (CaF 2 ), and about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening liver cancer activity. 45. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 18, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), Barium fluoride (BaF 2 ), about 0.0095% w/v to about 0.0255% w/v copper (II) oxide (CuO), Cadmium oxide (CdO) and about 0.1 1 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening lung cancer activity. 46. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 19, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), Barium fluoride (BaF 2 ), Strontium titanate (SrTi0 3 ), Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ), and about 0.1 1 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening lymphoma activity. 47. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 20, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), Barium fluoride (BaF 2 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.065% w/v Ferric oxide (Fe 2 0 3 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), and about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide for screening ovarian cancer activity. 48. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 21 , in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), Gallium (III) oxide (Ga 2 0 3 ), Bismuth Oxide (Bi 2 0 3 ), and about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.029% w/v Calcium fluoride (CaF 2 ) and about 0.1 1 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening pancreatic cancer activity. 49. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 22, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), about 0.0095% w/v to about 0.0255% w/v copper (II) oxide (CuO), Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ), about 0.0065% w/v to about 0.00225% w/v Tantalum (V) oxide (Ta 2 0 5 ), and about 0.1 1 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening prostate cancer activity. 50. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 23, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 4 ), Barium fluoride (BaF 2 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.065% w/v Ferric oxide (Fe 2 0 3 ), and about 0.1 1 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening skin cancer activity. 51. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 24, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), about 0.004% w/v to about 0.0055% w/v Silver (I) oxide (Ag 2 0), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.029% w/v Calcium fluoride (CaF 2 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.475% w/v Lead (IV) oxide (Pb0 2 ), and about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ), for screening stomach cancer activity. 52. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 26, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 4 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.065% w/v Ferric oxide (Fe 2 0 3 ), Strontium titanate (SrTi0 3 ), and about 0.004% w/v to about 0.0285% w/v Niobium (V) oxide (Nb 2 0 5 ), for screening calcium activity. 53. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 28, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 ), about 0.004% w/v to about 0.0285% w/v Niobium (V) oxide (Nb 2 0 5 ), about 0.11 % w/v to about 0.145% w/v Aluminum oxide (Al 2 0 3 ) and Strontium titanate (SrTi0 3 ), for screening potassium activity. 54. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 29, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 ), about 0.004% w/v to about 0.0285% w/v Niobium (V) oxide (Nb 2 0 5 ), Potassium Chloride (KCI), about 0.0095% w/v to about 0.0255% w/v copper (II) oxide (CuO), for screening iron activity. 55. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 30, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 4 ), about 0.004% w/v to about 0.0285% w/v Niobium (V) oxide (Nb 2 0 5 ), about 0.0095% w/v to about 0.0125% w/v calcium carbonate (CaC0 3 ) and 0.0035% w/v to about 0.0115% w/v of Tin powder (Sn), for screening sulfur activity. 56. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 31 , in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 ), about 0.0095% w/v to about 0.0255% w/v copper (II) oxide (CuO), Strontium titanate (SrTi0 3 ), about 0.0075% w/v to about 0.0105% w/v Molybdenum (VI) oxide (Mo0 3 ), for screening nickel activity. 57. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 32, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 ), Vanadium (V) oxide (V 2 0 5 ), about 0.0045% w/v to about 0.029% w/v Calcium fluoride (CaF 2 ), 0.0035% w/v to about 0.0115% w/v of Tin powder (Sn), for screening Stage 3 active cancer activity. 58. A screening composition comprising â¢ a screening composition base of claim 33, in combination with â¢ an activator composition comprising about 0.0004% w/v to about 0.055% w/v Nickel (II) oxide (NiO), from about 0.008% w/v to about 0.0265% w/v Potassium phosphate, monobasic (KH 2 P0 4 ), about 0.0085% w/v to about 0.035% w/v boron 

 trioxide (Br 2 0 3 ), Cadmuim oxide (CdO), and about 0.0095% w/v to about 0.0255% w/v copper (II) oxide (CuO), for screening Stage 4 active cancer activity. 59. A screening strip comprising: â¢ an solid phase layer, comprising an adsorbent; and â¢ a screening composition according to any one of claims 34 to 58. 60. A method of screening comprising the steps of: a) contacting a screening composition according to any one of claims 34 to 58 or a screening strip according to claim 59, with a body fluid of a subject; b) measuring and comparing a fluorescence level from said screening composition or said screening strip contacted with said bodily fluid of said subject to a positive and/or negative control fluid samples; wherein a fluorescence level comparable to said negative control is indicative of an absence of cancer; wherein a fluorescence level intermediate to said negative control and said positive control is indicative of an intermediate level of cancer; and wherein absence of fluorescence is indicative of a cancer presence. 61. The method of claim 60, further comprising the step a") prior to performing said method: a") obtaining a bodily fluid from said subject. 62. The method of claim 61 , further comprising contacting said screening composition or said screening strip contacted with said bodily fluid of said subject with an activator composition prior to step b. 63. The method of any one of claims 60 to 62, wherein said body fluid is chosen from saliva, mucus, urine, blood, lymph, or combinations thereof. 64. The method of any one of claims 60 to 63, wherein said subject is a human. 65. Use of a screening composition according to any one of claims 34 to 59 or a screening strip according to claim 59 for cancer screening.
